title: Fantasy Character Concept AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-detail 3D CG oriental fantasy swordswoman poster using adult silver-lavender East Asian fantasy swordswoman with calm violet-gray eyes. Subject: adult silver-lavender East Asian fantasy swordswoman with calm violet-gray eyes; mature, elegant, restrained, heroic, and clearly adult. Scene: romantic oriental garden with wisteria, stone path, flower arch, and distant pavilion; keep the background romantic but secondary to the character silhouette. Composition: one long sword points toward the camera while the second sword hangs downward for balance; full-body low-angle vertical composition with strong foreground sword perspective. Signature Elements: long silver-purple hair, ribbons, skirt panels, translucent gauze, and petals swept by garden wind; hair, ribbons, skirt layers, petals, and gauze should form an S-curve motion flow. Style: fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish; semi-realistic anime 3D character render with detailed face, fabric, metal, and cinematic natural light. Color Palette: fixed source color palette; keep the palette cool, elegant, and floral without becoming flat illustration. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Fantasy Character Concept Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-detail 3D CG oriental fantasy swordswoman poster using adult moonlit garden blade dancer with refined face and quiet heroic pressure. Subject: adult moonlit garden blade dancer with refined face and quiet heroic pressure; mature, elegant, restrained, heroic, and clearly adult. Scene: night-bloom courtyard with violet flowers, wet stone steps, lantern haze, and soft pavilion silhouettes; keep the background romantic but secondary to the character silhouette. Composition: crossed twin swords forming a near-camera X perspective while the body stays elegant and upright; full-body low-angle vertical composition with strong foreground sword perspective. Signature Elements: veil sleeves, hair tassels, flower petals, and sword ribbons spiraling around the figure; hair, ribbons, skirt layers, petals, and gauze should form an S-curve motion flow. Style: fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish; semi-realistic anime 3D character render with detailed face, fabric, metal, and cinematic natural light. Color Palette: fixed source color palette; keep the palette cool, elegant, and floral without becoming flat illustration. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
